descriptionText: Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 | 4 cabins | Tax Not Paid | Good ConditionLagoon 440 for sale 2008 — ALICE is a well-presented 2008 catamaran that combines comfortable living spaces with practical cruising capability; she is in good condition and ready for further adventures or coastal cruising.This Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 measures an overall length of 13.61 m and is built in GRP (fibreglass) with a gelcoat finish, a construction that gives a balance of durability and manageable maintenance for a yacht of this age. Propulsion comes from Volvo Penta D2-55 inboard engines (55 hp each), installed as twin units for redundancy and improved manoeuvrability under power. The layout provides four double cabins and four heads, making the boat well suited to family cruising or charter use with comfortable private cabins for guests. An electric windlass is fitted to ease anchoring operations.The Lagoon 440’s hull and deck design reflect the work of naval architects Marc Van Peteghem and Vincent Lauriot‑Prévost. The design emphasises seaworthiness and reduced pitching through careful bow volume and weight distribution, and the gull‑wing bridgedeck helps smooth passage through waves. The raised central helm station offers excellent all‑round visibility and places primary controls within easy reach, while the flybridge provides an expansive steering position and social area. Deck ergonomics and a large aft cockpit make handling and entertaining straightforward.Inside, the saloon offers 360° views and a flexible dining and lounging area. The galley is L‑shaped and fitted for practical meal preparation with stainless steel worktops, two fridges, a large oven, a flush‑mounted 3‑burner hob and multiple sinks and lockers — suitable for extended cruising. The aft cabins feature generous berths and large hull windows for natural light, and in the owner’s version the starboard hull can be a full luxury suite with dedicated workspace and storage. Ventilation is aided by multiple opening hatches and portholes.Systems and equipment aboard the Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 include full navigation instrumentation, autopilot, chartplotter/GPS, VHF, log and echo sounder, air conditioning with separate zones, a watermaker, 220 V shore power and generator, and a Hi‑Fi system. Tankage is substantial for extended cruising: around 900 L fresh water and approximately 650 L fuel. A tender with outboard is also carried.Specifications (key items)Model / Name: Lagoon 440 — ALICE.Year: 2008.LOA: 13.61 m.Beam: 7.70 m.Draft: 1.30 m.Construction: GRP (fibreglass) hull, gelcoat finish.Engines: 2 × Volvo Penta D2‑55 (55 hp each), saildrive.Fuel / Water: Fuel ≈ 650 L; Fresh water ≈ 900 L.Accommodations: 4 double cabins, 4 heads (sleeps 8 + space for 2 crew).Sail area: Total ≈ 116 m² (mainsail 74 m², furling genoa 42 m²).Notable equipment: Electric windlass, watermaker, generator, air conditioning, chartplotter, tender.This Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 is oriented towards comfortable offshore cruising with practical systems and good living space for the size. descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 | 4 cabins | Tax Not Paid | Good Condition

Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 — ALICE is a well-presented 2008 catamaran that combines comfortable living spaces with practical cruising capability; she is in good condition and ready for further adventures or coastal cruising.

This Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 measures an overall length of 13.61 m and is built in GRP (fibreglass) with a gelcoat finish, a construction that gives a balance of durability and manageable maintenance for a yacht of this age. Propulsion comes from Volvo Penta D2-55 inboard engines (55 hp each), installed as twin units for redundancy and improved manoeuvrability under power. The layout provides four double cabins and four heads, making the boat well suited to family cruising or charter use with comfortable private cabins for guests. An electric windlass is fitted to ease anchoring operations.

The Lagoon 440’s hull and deck design reflect the work of naval architects Marc Van Peteghem and Vincent Lauriot‑Prévost. The design emphasises seaworthiness and reduced pitching through careful bow volume and weight distribution, and the gull‑wing bridgedeck helps smooth passage through waves. The raised central helm station offers excellent all‑round visibility and places primary controls within easy reach, while the flybridge provides an expansive steering position and social area. Deck ergonomics and a large aft cockpit make handling and entertaining straightforward.

Inside, the saloon offers 360° views and a flexible dining and lounging area. The galley is L‑shaped and fitted for practical meal preparation with stainless steel worktops, two fridges, a large oven, a flush‑mounted 3‑burner hob and multiple sinks and lockers — suitable for extended cruising. The aft cabins feature generous berths and large hull windows for natural light, and in the owner’s version the starboard hull can be a full luxury suite with dedicated workspace and storage. Ventilation is aided by multiple opening hatches and portholes.

Systems and equipment aboard the Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 include full navigation instrumentation, autopilot, chartplotter/GPS, VHF, log and echo sounder, air conditioning with separate zones, a watermaker, 220 V shore power and generator, and a Hi‑Fi system. Tankage is substantial for extended cruising: around 900 L fresh water and approximately 650 L fuel. A tender with outboard is also carried.

Specifications (key items)

  • Model / Name: Lagoon 440 — ALICE.
  • Year: 2008.
  • LOA: 13.61 m.
  • Beam: 7.70 m.
  • Draft: 1.30 m.
  • Construction: GRP (fibreglass) hull, gelcoat finish.
  • Engines: 2 × Volvo Penta D2‑55 (55 hp each), saildrive.
  • Fuel / Water: Fuel ≈ 650 L; Fresh water ≈ 900 L.
  • Accommodations: 4 double cabins, 4 heads (sleeps 8 + space for 2 crew).
  • Sail area: Total ≈ 116 m² (mainsail 74 m², furling genoa 42 m²).
  • Notable equipment: Electric windlass, watermaker, generator, air conditioning, chartplotter, tender.

This Lagoon 440 for sale 2008 is oriented towards comfortable offshore cruising with practical systems and good living space for the size. Contact us now for more details or to book your viewing.
